title: Whale Wake Cross-Sectional Screener

tooling_hooks.inspect_signature: uv run python one_off_scripts/show_signature.py custom_scripts.automated_trading_strats save_strategy_note

notes: Generated outputs under this strategy directory are gitignored by default.
The saved thesis text was normalized to remove terminal control-sequence artifacts from the source paste.
Implementation notes capture the yfinance-based production-upgrade draft, but executable pricing in this repo should remain IBKR-first.
